_note: Flumen menu in Blender: which action shows in which context. Each action has a gate: 'task': true needs an open task; 'type' / 'step' / 'category' must match one of the listed values; the *_not variants must NOT match. An empty gate {} = always shown. Delete an action's entry to fall back to the built-in default. Add an action's name to 'hide' to remove it from the menu everywhere. Unknown action names are ignored. Apply with: flumen publish-config
